meaning: n.尽情欢乐,寻欢作乐,狂欢者
examples: The way many Americans view Mexico-as a cheap place to vacation, shop and party, all while ignoring the fact that the poorer locals can't afford to join the merrymaking.
Come and join in the merrymaking.
To engage in boisterous, drunken merrymaking.
The ensuing festivities combine merrymaking with the chanting of traditional Qiang epics by the shibi, singing and the drinking of wine.
